docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,548.00 FILED BY BRESSELSMITH WILLIAM A AS TO DEFENDANT KRIEGER M MR DBA TRANS WORLD VISA /CLUB PACIFIC KRIEGER M MRS. DBA TRANS WORLD VISA / CLUB PACIFIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KRIEGER M MR DBA TRANS WORLD VISA /CLUB PACIFIC KRIEGER M MRS. DBA TRANS WORLD VISA / CLUB PACIFIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRESSELSMITH WILLIAM A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KRIEGER M MR DBA TRANS WORLD VISA /CLUB PACIFIC KRIEGER M MRS. DBA TRANS WORLD VISA / CLUB PACIFIC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INADVERTENTLY SCHEDULED TO JUDGE CHOPPELAS SHOULD HAVE BEEN SCHEDULED TO JUDGE COLBERT
